zh.lifeSummary: Abigail FitzWaleran於大約1060年出生在英國諾福爾可。她於1083年之前與John the huntsman FitzWaleran在英國結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Abigail FitzWaleran于大约1060年出生在英国諾福爾可。她于1083年之前与John the huntsman FitzWaleran在英国结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Abigail FitzWaleran was born about 1060, in Norfolk, England. She married John the huntsman FitzWaleran before 1083, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Abigail FitzWaleran est née environ 1060, à Norfolk, Angleterre. Elle a épousé John the huntsman FitzWaleran avant 1083, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Abigail FitzWaleran wurde um 1060 in Norfolk, England geboren. Sie hat vor 1083 in England John the huntsman FitzWaleran geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Abigail FitzWaleran è nata il circa 1060 nel Norfolk, England. Lei sposato John the huntsman FitzWaleran prima del 1083, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia.

ja.Norfolk, England: イギリスイギリスノーフォルク
ja.lifeSummary: Abigail FitzWaleranは約1060年にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた。1083年以前にイギリスでJohn the huntsman FitzWaleranと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Abigail FitzWaleran(은)는 대략 1060년 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1083년 이전 영국에서 John the huntsman FitzWaleran(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Abigail FitzWaleran nasceu aproximadamente 1060, em Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com John the huntsman FitzWaleran antes 1083, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Abigail FitzWaleran родилась около 1060 г. в местности норфолк, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John the huntsman FitzWaleran перед 1083 г. в местности Англия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Abigail FitzWaleran nació aproximadamente 1060, en Norfolk, Inglaterra. Se casó con John the huntsman FitzWaleran antes de 1083, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija.
